## Summary

A concise description of the feature or enhancement you are proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable? Please describe any workarounds you are currently using.

## Proposed API / Design

If applicable, describe the proposed component selector, inputs, outputs, or theming tokens. Code examples are welcome.

```typescript
// Example usage
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered, and why you prefer this approach.

## Additional Context

Links to prior art, related issues, relevant specifications, or screenshots.
